metadata.description: SideQuest - ADHD-friendly Claude Code plugins for developers who thrive on hyperfocus. Tools that work with your brain, not against it.

plugins.name: atuin
plugins.description: Atuin shell history integration - search, capture, and manage bash command history with AI. Never lose a command again.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git intelligence for Claude Code - session context, commit history, smart commits with Conventional Commits. Includes 5 lifecycle hooks (SessionStart/PreToolUse/PostToolUse/PreCompact/Stop) and slash commands.

plugins.name: bun-runner
plugins.description: [EXTRACTED] Smart test runner MCP server — now published as @side-quest/bun-runner on npm. Use side-quest-plugins repo instead.

plugins.name: tsc-runner
plugins.description: [EXTRACTED] TypeScript type checking — now published as @side-quest/tsc-runner on npm. Use side-quest-plugins repo instead.

plugins.name: biome-runner
plugins.description: [EXTRACTED] Biome linter & formatter — now published as @side-quest/biome-runner on npm. Use side-quest-plugins repo instead.

plugins.name: validate-plugin
plugins.description: Automatically validates plugin files after edits. Catches invalid marketplace.json, plugin.json, and hooks.json before they cause problems.

plugins.name: para-obsidian
plugins.description: PARA-style Obsidian vault management with frontmatter validation, template versioning, and git auto-commit. Provides 20+ MCP tools, 15 slash commands, and 7 skills for complete vault operations including AI-assisted content injection and progressive summarization distillation.

plugins.name: claude-code-docs
plugins.description: Claude Code documentation - auto-updating local docs with search skill. Provides offline access to official documentation with automated fetching, indexing, and intelligent search.

plugins.name: claude-code-claude-md
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md manager for creating and optimizing memory files across the hierarchical cascade system. Includes templates for user/project/module levels, token optimization strategies, and comprehensive best practices.

plugins.name: plugin-template
plugins.description: Generate new plugin scaffolds with configurable components. Create commands, MCP servers, hooks, and skills following SideQuest marketplace patterns. TDD-tested generator with comprehensive templates.

plugins.name: firecrawl
plugins.description: Firecrawl plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: mcp-manager
plugins.description: Manage MCP servers - add, list, enable, and disable without removing configurations.

plugins.name: kit
plugins.description: Kit CLI integration for intelligent code search. Provides fast grep, semantic vector search with automatic fallback, and symbol extraction for codebase navigation.

plugins.name: the-cinema-bandit
plugins.description: Generate Classic Cinemas booking confirmation emails with automated pricing and Gmail integration. Includes Playwright-based CLI scraper with selector-first fallback hierarchy, live pricing extraction, and beautiful HTML email templates.

plugins.name: scraper-toolkit
plugins.description: Playwright web scraping best practices and patterns learned from production scraping

plugins.name: claude-code-skill-expert
plugins.description: Expert guidance for creating high-quality Claude Code skills following Anthropic's best practices

plugins.name: clipboard
plugins.description: Cross-platform clipboard operations - copy and paste text with structured error handling

plugins.name: terminal
plugins.description: Terminal plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: dev-toolkit
plugins.description: Development skills for Bun CLI, runtime workflows, and developer experience patterns

plugins.name: bookmarks
plugins.description: Bookmark management for Claude Code

plugins.name: log-agent-issue
plugins.description: Fire-and-forget structured issue logger for subagents. Appends JSONL entries to ~/.claude/logs/agent-issues.jsonl with automatic rotation.

plugins.name: teams-scrape
plugins.description: Extract Microsoft Teams chat messages using macOS automation. Pure skill plugin - uses macos-automator MCP to navigate, capture, and parse Teams content into structured JSON.

plugins.name: x-api
plugins.description: [EXTRACTED] Read-only Twitter/X API v2 — now published as @side-quest/x-api on npm. Use side-quest-plugins repo instead.

plugins.name: bun-starter
plugins.description: Create, debug, and heal repos from nathanvale/bun-typescript-starter template. Includes scaffolding commands, diagnostic expert skill, and comprehensive reference docs for CI/CD, publishing, testing, and security.
